character.name: Male assassin, dark black hair,
character.prompt:
Male assassin, dark black hair, lean build. Dark navy hooded jacket
(hood down), dark pants, dark boots. Dual blades with void-purple
glow (#9B59B6). Purple void energy on weapon edges, eyes, and faint
shadow tendrils at feet. Dark, spectral presence. Dark fantasy pixel
art, Diablo 2 / Hades style, heavy black outline, muted palette with
void-purple accent, transparent background.
